name: Glima AI
description: Glima AI is an all-in-one AI creative platform for generating, editing, and enhancing images and videos using advanced artificial intelligence models.

name: How to Identify Eye Color Using Glima AI

step.name: Upload Your Photo
step.text: Choose a clear photo where the eyes are visible. A close-up image works best for accurate results.

step.name: Let AI Analyze
step.text: The tool automatically scans the image and detects the eye color using advanced AI technology.

step.name: View Instant Results
step.text: Get precise eye color details (like brown, blue, hazel, green, etc.) within seconds.

mainEntity.name: How does the AI Eye Color Identifier work?

acceptedAnswer.text: The tool uses advanced AI algorithms to analyze eye features in your uploaded image and accurately detect the eye color within seconds.

mainEntity.name: What type of images work best?

acceptedAnswer.text: Clear, high-quality images where the eyes are visible and well-lit provide the most accurate results. Close-up photos are ideal.

mainEntity.name: Can it detect all eye colors?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, the AI can identify common eye colors like brown, blue, green, and hazel, along with subtle variations and mixed shades.

mainEntity.name: How accurate is the eye color detection?

acceptedAnswer.text: The tool is highly accurate, but results may vary slightly based on image quality, lighting, and angle.
